description: Sector overlay for press, online media, audiovisual media, publishing, advertising, content governance, journalist ethics, and personal-data handling in Togo.

metadata.scope: Togo-only sector overlay controls for Media. Intended to be used with togo_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from Togolese and applicable regional legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Togo Code de la presse et de la communication, Law No. 2020-001
Official Togo media declarations and HAAC authorization notices
Togo personal data protection law materials
primary_sources.issuer: Togolese Republic / Personal Data Protection Authority

limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current Togolese laws, regional WAEMU/OHADA/CIMA instruments, regulator circulars, directives, codes and guidance before production reliance.
Automated results are screening signals only and require qualified human legal/compliance review.

rules.title: HAAC declaration, authorization, or registration evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for HAAC declaration, media authorization, press registration, or publication authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Togo Code de la presse et de la communication, Law No. 2020-001
Official Togo media declarations and HAAC authorization notices

rules.title: Journalistic ethics, accuracy, or correction controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for truthfulness, verification, right of reply, correction, ethics, impartiality, or editorial responsibility evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
